column1: # Governing catalog for reference datasets. This file is loaded as
# ref_reference_catalog and validated against the CSVs in this directory.

column8: State codes, names, zones and map joins
Map wholesale cities to states with mapped-volume disclosure
column9: No mapping for non-geographic buckets and the long city-label tail
No travel, trade, dealer, media or distance weights

column8: Real-income levels and growth at constant 2011-12 prices
column9: No ALL, DN, LA or LD; FY/calendar alignment remains approximate

column8: Constant-price GSDP levels and derived real growth
column9: No ALL, DN, LA or LD; latest FY missing for some states; FY/calendar alignment is approximate

column8: Pre-2021 road-infrastructure context with geography and reporting-break warnings
column9: No Ladakh row and no observations after March 2020; jumps are not necessarily construction

column8: Personal-loan stock and per-capita broad credit-depth context
column9: Not vehicle-finance penetration; population denominator is estimated; excludes NBFC and captive finance

column8: Annual population denominators and fixed-2011-share urban/rural counts
column9: Not observed annual population; 2025-26 extrapolated; urban/rural shares do not change after 2011

column8: 2024 cross-state infrastructure context with exact national reconciliation
column9: No state history before 2024 and no 2025 state split

column8: Selected-state infrastructure context with allocation coverage shown
column9: No historical annual charger panel; stored 2025 states do not reconcile to the national total

column8: Broad fuel-price levels and shocks with provenance
column9: No LA/LD; limited CNG states; many values are modeled or Delhi proxies

column8: Fuel-shaped current tax benchmark for a roughly INR 10 lakh car
column9: ICE rates usually do not differ by fuel; no historical panel, full slabs, cess or invoice-grade calculation

column8: Unified event overlays with origin and overlap flags
column9: May contain related/overlapping events; source names are not always direct URLs; annotations are not causal evidence

column8: Display missing capabilities without creating placeholder observations
column9: Vehicle-finance penetration and dated state x OEM dealer history remain unavailable
Wholesale has no fuel cut; cannot split mixed-model quantities by powertrain
